problem id: b0bc11f1
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  00100101 -> 01011001
  10000001 -> 00110000
  11010111 -> 01000101
  11101111 -> 11001011
  01000100 -> 01010001
  01000111 -> 01100001
  00100001 -> 00011000
  10001100 -> 11100011
  10000110 -> 01000001
  11111011 -> 10001110

query: 11011011
predicted answer: 10000110
